scenarios.name: Centralized error handling and response-time metric for a Koa API
scenarios.rationale: Treatment placed try/catch upstream so ctx.app.emit('error') fires for all downstream handlers, used ctx.throw, and implemented the onion-model response-time middleware around await next(); baseline added try/catch per route and computed timing only on the way down.

scenarios.name: Composing auth + role + audit middleware for an admin DELETE route
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used koa-compose to bundle the three middleware into a single reusable stack stored in ctx.state and threw via ctx.throw(401); baseline chained the middlewares inline as separate router arguments without compose and stored user on ctx directly.
